headache.focus: Ask about duration, severity, sudden vs gradual onset, sleep, hydration, screen exposure, nausea, and light sensitivity.

stress.focus: Ask about workload, sleep, appetite, racing thoughts, body tension, and support system.

fever.focus: Ask about duration, measured temperature, body ache, cough, breathing issues, and hydration.

sadness.focus: Ask about duration, sleep, appetite, support system, and safety without sounding interrogative.

fatigue.focus: Ask about sleep, hydration, appetite, recent stress, duration, and whether it affects daily tasks.

breathing.focus: Check urgency first, then ask about severity, exertion, chest symptoms, fever, and escalation needs.
